subject: [PATCH v4 04/21] zswap: add new helpers for zswap entry operations

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the naming and organization of the new helper functions, suggesting they might be too specific and could lead to code duplication. Asked for clarification on how these helpers will be used in the future.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series introduces new helper functions for zswap entry operations, aiming to abstract away these operations and facilitate re-implementation when swap is virtualized.
